validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with your rapport account.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Sign up with your email and a password.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: We'll send you a 6-digit code if an account with this email address exists.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the code from the email and your new password.
resetPassword.doneMessage: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: We've sent a 6-digit code to your email address.
verifyEmail.resentMessage: If an unverified account with this email address exists, a new code has been sent.
